items.question: Which prefix marks a cell magic?
items.explanation: %% applies to the whole cell and must be its first line; % is a line magic.

items.question: Why prefer %pip install over !pip install in a notebook?
items.explanation: This avoids installing into a different Python than the kernel uses.

items.question: Which magic gives a stable average timing of a fast operation?
items.explanation: %timeit runs the code many times and averages; %time runs once.

items.question: What does Esc do in a notebook?
items.explanation: Esc enters command mode (cell actions); Enter enters edit mode (typing).
